sections.name: Recent Federal Context
sections.focus: High-impact recent federal laws to keep in view when the live bill tracker is unavailable

items.title: C-19: Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit Act
items.description: Affordability measure replacing or expanding the GST/HST credit framework with a groceries and essentials benefit for lower-income households.
importanceReasons: Direct affordability impact for lower-income households.

items.title: C-5: One Canadian Economy Act
items.description: Economic and infrastructure legislation focused on interprovincial trade, labour mobility, and major project approvals.
importanceReasons: Touches infrastructure, trade barriers, labour mobility, and economic development.

items.title: Current bills before Parliament

items.title: Bills and proposed laws

importanceReasons: Official context for current bills and how they progress toward becoming law.

items.title: Order Paper and questions
items.description: Daily House business and questions, useful for seeing what Parliament is scheduled to debate.
importanceReasons: Shows what is before the House now or next, including debates and questions.

items.title: Select committees
items.description: Select committee work, submissions, inquiries, and bill scrutiny before later House stages.
importanceReasons: Many bills are shaped in committee before second and third readings.

policyWatch.title: Out-of-control wildfire burning near Boston Bar, B.C. prompts evacuation for about 60 residences
policyWatch.description: A tactical evacuation is underway in North Bend, B.C., where residents are being told to leave immediately because of the nearby Brunswick Creek wildfire that’s burning near Boston Bar in the province’s Fraser Canyon region.
importanceReasons: Relevant to public safety; surfaced from Local coverage.

policyWatch.title: Taxpayers could be on hook for West Coast pipeline, but it's a 'good investment': Energy minister
policyWatch.description: Energy Minister Tim Hodgson says a second pipeline to the West Coast will be money well-spent for the federal government but can't say how much Ottawa would be on the hook for.
importanceReasons: Relevant to climate & infrastructure; surfaced from National coverage.

policyWatch.title: No houses lost in Fort Simpson, N.W.T., wildfire
policyWatch.description: Some outbuildings have been damaged confirm officials on Saturday morning, with a challenging day ahead as fire grows in the south and continues to burn in residential areas
importanceReasons: Relevant to public safety; surfaced from National coverage.

policyWatch.title: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
policyWatch.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".
importanceReasons: Relevant to war & security, climate & infrastructure; surfaced from World coverage.

policyWatch.title: St. Petersburg oil terminal hit as Ukraine presses long-range drone campaign
policyWatch.description: A Ukrainian drone attack struck an oil terminal in St. Petersburg on Saturday, Russian officials said, as Kyiv pressed on with the bombardment of Russia’s oil infrastructure.
importanceReasons: Relevant to war & security, climate & infrastructure; surfaced from National coverage.

policyWatch.title: Trump vows to still deliver Fourth of July speech after weather prompts D.C. event evacuation
importanceReasons: Relevant to public safety; surfaced from National coverage.

policyWatch.title: Iran war live: Millions mourn Khamenei, Trump hints at Netanyahu meeting
policyWatch.description: Iran's late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and members of his family were killed in a US-Israeli air strike in February.
importanceReasons: Relevant to war & security; surfaced from World coverage.

policyWatch.title: How a First Nation in B.C. is hoping to restore wildfire-ravaged forests with seedlings
policyWatch.description: The Osoyoos Forest Nursery located near Oliver, B.C, is owned by the Osoyoos Indian Band. The operation is the band's first green project and it is expected to produce millions of tree seedlings every year. Those seedlings will go towards restoring and reforesting areas hard hit by wildfires.
importanceReasons: Relevant to public safety; surfaced from Local coverage.
